title: Marvin Sagastume - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Marvin Sagastume - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Marvin Sagastume
Khoury Alumni
BS in Computer Science ’21
Combined major: CS and Finance
Marvin Sagastume found himself drawn to Northeastern by Khoury College’s combined majors, giving him the opportunity to blend his computing passion with something wider. Now at Outcomes4Me, he’s doing just that by helping develop a user-friendly information platform for cancer patients.
I love that every day when I come to work, I’m proud of what I’m doing. I’ve gone from having very little experience … to building software that is doing very complex things. That’s inspiring
Marvin Sagastume, BSCS ’21
Explore all Khoury Stories
Mission-based cancer care platform Outcomes4Me uses Khoury students to fuel growth
May 1st, 2023
